full_text:
Zhou Zhi 周旨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Zhi (周旨). Fought against Wu. Ambushes and kills Sun Xin then kills Shen Rong in a raid. Zhou Zhi was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
